dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: NIS2 compliance overview and recent activity
dashboard.needTwoScans: Need at least 2 scans for trend
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Get started by adding your assets (domains, IPs) and running your first compliance scan against NIS2 Directive requirements.
dashboard.recentScansDescription: Latest compliance scans and their results
dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.needExpertHelp: Need expert help with NIS2 compliance, certificate remediation, or custom assessments?
dashboard.needExpertDescription: Private scans, incident response, staff training, and ongoing monitoring available.

scans.title: Scans
scans.subtitle: Manage and monitor your compliance scans
scans.name: Name
scans.noScansDescription: Run your first compliance scan to assess your infrastructure against NIS2 requirements.

assets.title: Assets
assets.subtitle: Manage your monitored assets and targets
assets.dialogDescription: Add a domain, IP, or CIDR block to scan for NIS2 compliance
assets.name: Name
assets.emptyDescription: Add domains, IPs, or CIDR ranges to monitor. Assets are the targets you scan for NIS2 compliance.
assets.editDescription: Update the name or tags. Type and target value are immutable to keep historical scans referenceable.
assets.typeImmutable: Type cannot be changed after creation.
assets.targetImmutable: Target value cannot be changed after creation.

schedulesPage.title: Scheduled Scans
schedulesPage.subtitle: Automate recurring compliance scans
schedulesPage.createDescription: Define when and what to scan automatically
schedulesPage.noAssetsYet: No assets yet. Add assets first.
schedulesPage.name: Name
schedulesPage.triggered: Scan triggered! Check the Scans page for progress.

teamPage.title: Team Management
teamPage.subtitle: Manage members and their roles
teamPage.inviteDescription: Send an invitation to join your organization
teamPage.noMembersDescription: Invite your first colleague to start collaborating on NIS2 compliance.
teamPage.memberRemoved: {name} has been removed from the team
teamPage.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
teamPage.confirmRemoveDescription: {name} will lose access to this organization immediately. They can be re-invited later, but any pending work assigned to them stays with the organization.
teamPage.confirmDemoteDescription: {name} will move from {from} to {to} and lose admin privileges (member management, API key creation, organization settings). The change applies on their next request.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.subtitle: Configure how you receive scan alerts and updates
notificationsPage.emptyDescription: Add an email or webhook to get notified about scan results and critical findings.

findings.title: Findings
findings.subtitle: Review and manage compliance findings
findings.noFindingsFiltered: No findings match your current filters. Try adjusting the filter criteria.
findings.noFindingsDescription: Run a compliance scan to detect security findings across your assets.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Generate compliance reports from completed scans — PDF, HTML, Markdown, JSON, CSV, or JUnit XML.
reports.noCompletedScansDescription: Reports are generated from completed scans. Run a scan first; once it finishes you can export it in any of the supported formats.
reports.timeoutDescription: Try again or check the worker logs.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Manage your personal account settings
profilePage.passwordUpdatedDescription: Other devices and tabs will need to sign in again.
profilePage.newSameAsCurrent: The new password must differ from the current one

organizationPage.title: Organization
organizationPage.subtitle: Manage your organization settings
organizationPage.name: Organization Name
organizationPage.slugHelp: URL identifier, auto-generated from name. Cannot be changed.
organizationPage.orgIdHelp: Use this ID for API integrations
organizationPage.deleteOrgDescription: Permanently delete this organization and all its data

scanDefaultsPage.title: Scan Defaults
scanDefaultsPage.subtitle: Configure default settings for new compliance scans
scanDefaultsPage.performanceDescription: Control scan speed and resource usage
scanDefaultsPage.performanceTip: Higher concurrency scans faster but uses more resources. A timeout of 10s and concurrency of 20 is optimal for most audits.
scanDefaultsPage.modulesDescription: Enable or disable scan modules by default. Individual scans can override these.
scanDefaultsPage.portScanDescription: Scan 14 critical ports (SSH, RDP, SMB, MySQL, etc.) for exposure detection
scanDefaultsPage.webChecksDescription: HTTP headers, TLS/SSL, WAF detection, cookies, SRI, secrets, security.txt
scanDefaultsPage.dnsChecksDescription: DNSSEC, zone transfer (AXFR), SPF, DMARC, MX redundancy
scanDefaultsPage.whoisChecksDescription: Check domain registration expiry dates and warn before 30-day threshold

apiKeysPage.title: API Keys
apiKeysPage.subtitle: Manage API keys for programmatic access
apiKeysPage.createNewDescription: Give your API key a descriptive name
apiKeysPage.createdDescription: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see it again.
apiKeysPage.storeSecurely: Store this key securely. It will only be shown once.
apiKeysPage.name: Name
apiKeysPage.documentationDescription: Use your API key in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. See the API documentation for available endpoints and usage examples.
apiKeysPage.noKeysDescription: Create a key to authenticate CI/CD pipelines, monitoring integrations, or any external system that needs to call the API.

compliancePage.title: NIS2 Compliance Matrix
compliancePage.subtitle: Art. 21 D.Lgs 138/2024 — Cybersecurity risk management measures
compliancePage.noDataDescription: Run a compliance scan to populate the Art. 21 matrix automatically. Automated checks cover TLS, DNS, HTTP security headers, encryption, and more.
compliancePage.infoBody: This matrix maps Art. 21(2) requirements of the NIS2 Directive (EU 2022/2555), transposed into Italian law as D.Lgs 138/2024. Automated checks verify TLS, DNS, HTTP security headers, encryption, and incident handling. "Manual Review" entries require attestation from the compliance team.

auditLogPage.title: Audit Log
auditLogPage.subtitle: Track all changes and actions in your organization
auditLogPage.activityDescription: Showing recent actions. Audit logs are retained for 90 days.
auditLogPage.noEntriesDescription: Audit entries appear here whenever a user creates, updates or deletes resources.

auth.signInDescription: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard
auth.registerDescription: Get started with NIS2 compliance monitoring
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again to continue.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgotPasswordPage.successDescription: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link to it.
forgotPasswordPage.checkSpam: The link expires in 30 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it within a couple of minutes.

resetPasswordPage.title: Set a new password
resetPasswordPage.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPasswordPage.invalidLinkDescription: This link is missing the reset token. Request a new one to continue.
resetPasswordPage.invalidOrExpired: This reset link is invalid, expired, or has already been used. Request a new one.
resetPasswordPage.successDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with the new one.

scansNewPage.title: New Scan
scansNewPage.subtitle: Configure and launch a compliance scan
scansNewPage.selectAssetError: Please select at least one asset
scansNewPage.assetsDescription: Select assets to include in the scan
scansNewPage.noAssetsDescription: Add at least one domain, IP or CIDR before launching a scan.

scanDetailsPage.notFoundDescription: The requested scan does not exist or you don't have permission to view it.
scanDetailsPage.complianceMatrixDescription: Status of each area based on automated checks
scanDetailsPage.resultsDescription: Scan detail for each analysed target
scanDetailsPage.noResults: No results available for this scan.
scanDetailsPage.resultsPending: Results will appear when the scan completes.
scanDetailsPage.findingsDescription: Security issues detected during the scan
scanDetailsPage.findingsPending: Findings will appear when the scan completes.

scansComparePage.title: Scan Comparison
scansComparePage.subtitle: Compare findings between two scans to track progress
scansComparePage.newFindingsDescription: Issues found in the current scan that were not in the previous scan
scansComparePage.resolvedFindingsDescription: Issues from the previous scan that are no longer present
